config.context.claude.triggerPercent.des: Claude: Context trim trigger threshold (%). Removes old messages when exceeded.
config.context.claude.targetPercent.desc: Claude: Target context usage after trim (%). Must be lower than triggerPercent.
config.context.openai.targetPercent.desc: OpenAI: Target context usage after trim (%).
config.context.gemini.targetPercent.desc: Gemini: Target context usage after trim (%).
config.context.ollama.triggerPercent.des: Ollama: Context trim trigger threshold (%). Lower default for smaller models.
config.context.ollama.targetPercent.desc: Ollama: Target context usage after trim (%).
config.defaultProvider.description: Default AI provider for this workspace.
config.systemPrompt.description: Custom system prompt for this workspace (uses default prompt if empty).
config.maxTokensPerRequest.description: Maximum response tokens per AI request.
